ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement of the vehicle in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Drivetrain type of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., Special Purpose Vehicle, Midsize Cars) */,
  "vehicle_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "vehicle_model_code" TEXT /* Internal model code for the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  "vehicle_production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model started production */,
  "vehicle_production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model ended production */,
  "vehicle_version" TEXT /* Version of the vehicle model (e.g., base, deluxe) */,
  "vehicle_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the vehicle in liters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Regular, Premium) */,
  "fuel_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_fuel_density" REAL /* Fuel density in kg/L */,
  "fuel_type_emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor for the fuel type (e.g., CO2 emissions per liter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "co2_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* CO2 emission in grams per mile */,
  "co2_emission_grams_per_km" REAL /* CO2 emission in grams per kilometer */,
  "emission_year" INTEGER /* Year when the emission data was recorded */,
  "emission_test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test emissions (e.g., EPA, ISO) */,
  "emission_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission test was conducted */,
  "emission_certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number for the emission test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* City MPG */,
  "highway_mpg" REAL /* Highway MPG */,
  "combined_mpg" REAL /* Combined MPG */,
  "fuel_barrels_per_year" REAL /* Fuel barrels per year */,
  "fuel_efficiency_year" INTEGER /* Year when the fuel efficiency data was recorded */,
  "fuel_efficiency_test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test fuel efficiency (e.g., EPA, ISO) */,
  "fuel_efficiency_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the fuel efficiency test was conducted */,
  "fuel_efficiency_certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number for the fuel efficiency test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_fuel" (
  "vehicle_fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-fuel association */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "vehicle_fuel_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle-fuel association became effective */,
  "vehicle_fuel_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle-fuel association expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_fuel_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_fuel_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., user manual, technical specification) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "document_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_documents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
